# CWE-338 vulnerable — Use of Cryptographically Weak PRNG
lang: go
file: CWE-338-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"math/rand"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"time"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Save(model interface{}) error { return nil }

func RotateSessionID(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	rng := rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano()))
	sid := strconv.FormatInt(rng.Int63(), 10)
	return db.Save(map[string]string{"user": c.Request.URL.Query().Get("user"), "sid": sid})
}
